chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1209, 1210, 1211, 1212, 1213, 1214, 1215, 1262 and 1263 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.5713/2023 2. For hearing of main case 14.03.2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel for the petitioner, notices have been impugned herein, however, respective petitioners shall contest the same before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the notice be adjudicated vide speaking orders, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, however, in the meanwhile no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petitions may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad Per learned counsel show cause notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested by the petitioner before the issuing authority. Lerned counsel placed relieasn
